title: hibbertia stricta var. canescens
intro: Hibbertia stricta var. canescens, also known as the grey Guinea flower, is a variant of the Hibbertia stricta plant species, native to Australia. Traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine, this plant is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The grey Guinea flower has been used to support skin health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Hibbertia stricta var. canescens may include infusions, creams, and ointments, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
